message:
Enhance showcase UX: Mermaid fallback, mobile layout, diagnostics collapse

- Fall back to Mermaid.js rendering when WASM runtime is unavailable,
  giving the gallery and spotlight actual rendered diagrams instead of
  80 identical amber warning cards
- Collapse endpoint diagnostics behind <details> to reduce developer
  noise for first-time visitors
- Reorder playground columns on mobile so diagram renders appear before
  editor/debug panels (order-1/order-2 with xl: restore)
- Keep showcase atlas stat boxes in 3-column layout on all screen sizes
  with compact mobile text
- Add category dots to playground sample buttons for consistency
- Replace redundant raw code first-line subtitle with line count
- Use shimmer skeleton for gallery intermediate rendering state
- Fix spotlight scroll target to use scrollIntoView

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
